lineage.Process: AddField T:\城市体检\00原始数据\建成区\建成区\景德镇建成区.shp areaarea FLOAT # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
CalculateField T:\城市体检\00原始数据\建成区\建成区\景德镇建成区.shp areaarea !shape.area@acres! PYTHON_9.3 #

Project 景德镇建成区 F:\建成区0903\景德镇市建成区2022_CGCS2000_117E.shp PROJCS['CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_117E',GEOGCS['GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000',DATUM['D_China_2000',SPHEROID['CGCS2000',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION['Gauss_Kruger'],PARAMETER['False_Easting',500000.0],PARAMETER['False_Northing',0.0],PARAMETER['Central_Meridian',117.0],PARAMETER['Scale_Factor',1.0],PARAMETER['Latitude_Of_Origin',0.0],UNIT['Meter',1.0]] # PROJCS['CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_117E',GEOGCS['GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000',DATUM['D_China_2000',SPHEROID['CGCS2000',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION['Gauss_Kruger'],PARAMETER['False_Easting',500000.0],PARAMETER['False_Northing',0.0],PARAMETER['Central_Meridian',117.0],PARAMETER['Scale_Factor',1.0],PARAMETER['Latitude_Of_Origin',0.0],UNIT['Meter',1.0]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL
DeleteField 景德镇市建成区2022_CGCS2000_117E OBJECTID;SHAPE_Leng;SHAPE_Area;areaarea

Process.ToolSource: d:\esri arcgis desktop v10.7.0 zh-cn\desktop10.7\ArcToolbox\Toolboxes\Data Management Tools.tbx\PolygonToLine

lineage.Process: PolygonToLine 景德镇2023改_CGCS2000_117E D:\2023景德镇\景德镇建成区边界.shp IDENTIFY_NEIGHBORS

Process.ToolSource: d:\esri arcgis desktop v10.7.0 zh-cn\desktop10.7\ArcToolbox\Toolboxes\Data Management Tools.tbx\Merge

lineage.Process: Merge 景德镇建成区边界;景德镇2023改_路网 D:\2023景德镇\建成区加路网.shp "LEFT_FID "LEFT_FID" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,景德镇建成区边界,LEFT_FID,-1,-1;RIGHT_FID "RIGHT_FID" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,景德镇建成区边界,RIGHT_FID,-1,-1;OBJECTID "OBJECTID" true true false 9 Long 0 9 ,First,#,景德镇2023改_路网,OBJECTID,-1,-1;DLBH "DLBH" true true false 15 Text 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇2023改_路网,DLBH,-1,-1;XZQDM "XZQDM" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇2023改_路网,XZQDM,-1,-1;XMC "XMC" true true false 30 Text 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇2023改_路网,XMC,-1,-1;CD "CD" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇2023改_路网,CD,-1,-1;FLM "FLM" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇2023改_路网,FLM,-1,-1;DLMC "DLMC" true true false 30 Text 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇2023改_路网,DLMC,-1,-1;CDS "CDS" true true false 4 Short 0 4 ,First,#,景德镇2023改_路网,CDS,-1,-1;BZ "BZ" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇2023改_路网,BZ,-1,-1;长度 "长度" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇2023改_路网,长度,-1,-1"

Process.ToolSource: d:\esri arcgis desktop v10.7.0 zh-cn\desktop10.7\ArcToolbox\Toolboxes\Data Management Tools.tbx\FeatureToPolygon

lineage.Process: FeatureToPolygon 建成区加路网 D:\2023景德镇\1.shp # ATTRIBUTES #

Process.ToolSource: d:\esri arcgis desktop v10.7.0 zh-cn\desktop10.7\ArcToolbox\Toolboxes\Data Management Tools.tbx\CalculateField

lineage.Process: CalculateField 1 YDFL H1X VB #

lineage.Process: CalculateField 1 YDFL H1X VB #

Process.ToolSource: d:\esri arcgis desktop v10.7.0 zh-cn\desktop10.7\ArcToolbox\Toolboxes\Data Management Tools.tbx\CalculateField

lineage.Process: CalculateField 1 YDFL H1X VB #
Clip 1 景德镇市辖区 D:\ylf\城市体检2023\2023景德镇\用地分类裁剪.shp #

FeatureClassToFeatureClass 景德镇用地分类 E:\新建个人地理数据库.mdb\jdz jingdezhen # "Id "Id" true true false 6 Long 0 6 ,First,#,景德镇用地分类,Id,-1,-1;YDFL "YDFL" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇用地分类,YDFL,-1,-1;MJ "MJ" true true false 13 Float 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇用地分类,MJ,-1,-1" #
CalculateField jingdezhen 待定 "不划入" VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen 待定 "不划入" VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen 待定 "不划入" VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen 待定 "不划入" VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen YDFL R3 VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen YDFL "R3" VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen YDFL "M" VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen YDFL "X2" VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen 待定 "不划入" VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen 待定 "不划入" VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen 类别 "区域交通" VB #
CalculateField jingdezhen 类别 "其他" VB #
Merge 景德镇_区域交通;景德镇_建成区 D:\景德镇\0804景德镇建成区.shp "面积 "面积" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,景德镇_区域交通,面积,-1,-1,景德镇_建成区,面积,-1,-1"

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
